fields.name: api_token
fields.title: API Token
fields.description: Your Pylon API token. Only admin users can create API tokens.

custom_description:
Pylon is a customer support platform that helps B2B companies manage customer interactions
across Slack, email, chat widgets, and other channels. This connector provides access to
issues, accounts, contacts, teams, tags, users, custom fields, ticket forms, and user roles
for customer support analytics and account intelligence insights.
supported_questions:
- List all open issues in Pylon
- Show me all accounts in Pylon
- List all contacts in Pylon
- What teams are configured in my Pylon workspace?
- Show me all tags used in Pylon
- List all users in my Pylon account
- Show me the custom fields configured for issues
- List all ticket forms in Pylon
- What user roles are available in Pylon?
- Show me details for a specific issue
- Get details for a specific account
- Show me details for a specific contact
- Reply to the customer on an issue saying we are looking into it
- Send a message to the customer on the billing issue
- Assign an issue to a specific team member
- Change the status of an issue to waiting_on_customer
- Close an issue as resolved
- Delete a test issue
- What are the most common issue sources this month?
- Show me issues assigned to a specific team
- Which accounts have the most open issues?
- Analyze issue resolution times over the last 30 days
- List contacts associated with a specific account
unsupported_questions:
- Delete an account
- Schedule a meeting with a contact

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the issue

fields.name: title
fields.description: Title of the issue

fields.name: state
fields.description: Current state of the issue (e.g. new, in_progress, closed)

fields.name: source
fields.description: Channel the issue originated from (e.g. email, slack)

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type classification of the issue

fields.name: number
fields.description: Human-readable issue number within the workspace

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the issue was created, in ISO 8601 format

fields.name: latest_message_time
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent message on the issue, in ISO 8601 format

fields.name: resolution_time
fields.description: Timestamp when the issue was resolved, in ISO 8601 format

fields.name: snoozed_until_time
fields.description: Timestamp the issue is snoozed until, in ISO 8601 format

fields.name: customer_portal_visible
fields.description: Whether the issue is visible in the customer portal

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the account

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of the account (customer organization)

fields.name: domain
fields.description: Primary domain associated with the account

fields.name: primary_domain
fields.description: Canonical primary domain for the account

fields.name: type
fields.description: Classification of the account (e.g. customer, prospect)

fields.name: is_disabled
fields.description: Whether the account has been disabled

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the account was created, in ISO 8601 format

fields.name: latest_customer_activity_time
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent activity from this account, in ISO 8601 format

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the contact

fields.name: name
fields.description: Full name of the contact

fields.name: email
fields.description: Primary email address of the contact

fields.name: primary_phone_number
fields.description: Primary phone number of the contact

fields.name: portal_role
fields.description: Role the contact has in the customer portal

fields.description: Unique identifier for the team

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of the team

fields.description: Unique identifier for the tag

fields.name: value
fields.description: Display value of the tag

fields.name: object_type
fields.description: Type of object this tag applies to (e.g. issue, account)

fields.name: role_id

fields.name: status

fields.name: label

fields.name: slug
fields.description: URL-safe identifier for the custom field

fields.name: type
fields.description: Data type of the custom field (e.g. text, select)

fields.name: object_type
fields.description: Type of object this custom field applies to (e.g. issue, account)

fields.name: is_read_only
fields.description: Whether the custom field is read-only

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the custom field was created, in ISO 8601 format
